Off Calendar Oct-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT THE PACIFIC EXCHANGE, INC, NYSE ARCA'S Motion To Set Aside Defaults And Default Judgment IS RENOTICED FOR DECEMBER 5, 2007. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Reporter: Janet Pond, CSR # 5292 =301/REQ

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
William Hickey, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: The Dentists Insurance Company, a California Corp.
Plaintiff's Witness: Reginald Green, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Pacific Exchange, Inc. and NYSE Arca., Inc., as follows:
Principal $206,622.94
Prejudgment Interest $10,991.00
No Costs, for a total of $217,613.94
Counsel to prepare Judgment for signature.

Mar. 12, 2007
Judgment for signature rec'd in court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2007 Continued To Mar-26-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
